params.name: Karrier AC
params.description:
On Apr 16, 1906 AD, Willis Carrier successfully invented the modern air conditioning system.
Carrier was asked to solve a printing problem at a printing plant. After research, he found that unstable air humidity and temperature made it difficult to control printing effects. Later, an experience waiting for a train on a foggy day gave him the inspiration to invent a device that used a cold water pipeline to cool the air, causing water vapor to condense and thus controlling both the environment …
